_comment: Contact details (email, phone) are plausible placeholder-format examples for demo purposes only and must be verified before real-world use.

listings.name: Whistle Messaging
listings.description: Whistle Messaging, now part of Actabl, is a guest messaging and contactless service platform used by hotels to text guests before, during, and after their stay. It automates check-in instructions, upsell offers, and service requests through a two-way SMS and chat interface.
usps: Now part of Actabl's operations suite

listings.name: ALICE
listings.description: ALICE, now part of Actabl, is a hotel operations and guest messaging platform that lets front desk, housekeeping, and concierge staff manage guest requests received via text message or app from a single dashboard. It is used by hotel groups to coordinate service delivery in real time.

listings.name: Akia
listings.description: Akia is a US-based guest messaging and automation platform that lets hotels communicate with guests over SMS, WhatsApp, and web chat for check-in, upsells, and service requests. It uses templated and AI-assisted automation to reduce manual front-desk messaging workload.
usps: Growing North American hotel client base

listings.name: Duve
listings.description: Duve is an Israeli guest experience and messaging platform used by hotels and short-term rental operators to automate pre-arrival communication, upsells, and digital check-in. It centralizes guest conversations from multiple channels into a single team inbox.
usps: Strong short-term rental & boutique hotel fit
Combines messaging with upsell revenue tools

listings.name: GuestJoy
listings.description: GuestJoy provides automated guest messaging alongside its CRM and upsell tools, letting hotels send pre-arrival, in-stay, and post-stay messages triggered by PMS events. It is popular with independent European hotels looking to automate guest communication and upselling together.

listings.name: Bookboost
listings.description: Bookboost's messaging product gives hotels a unified inbox for guest communication across SMS, WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, and email, tied to the property's CRM data. It is used by independent hotels and small groups to centralize guest service conversations.
usps: Combines messaging with CRM in one tool

listings.name: HelloShift
listings.description: HelloShift is a San Francisco-based guest messaging and staff collaboration platform for hotels, combining a unified guest inbox with internal team communication tools. It helps front desk, housekeeping, and management coordinate around guest requests in real time.
usps: Combines guest and staff messaging in one app
Strong hotel group adoption in North America

listings.name: Kipsu
listings.description: Kipsu is a Minneapolis-based real-time guest messaging platform used by hotels to handle service requests and guest communication over SMS and web chat. It emphasizes fast, personal response times for service recovery and concierge-style guest interactions.
usps: Strong North American hotel group adoption

listings.name: Volara
listings.description: Volara is a Houston-based voice and messaging platform that connects hotels' smart speakers and chat channels to their PMS and service systems. Guests can make requests by voice or text, which Volara routes to the right hotel department automatically.
usps: Pioneer of voice-based hotel guest service
Combines voice and text messaging channels

listings.name: Zingle (Medallia Concierge)
listings.description: Zingle was a guest messaging platform acquired by Medallia in 2019 and rebranded as Medallia Concierge, giving hotels a two-way texting and chat channel tied to Medallia's broader guest experience analytics. It automates routine messaging while surfacing guest sentiment data.
usps: Backed by Medallia's enterprise CX platform

listings.name: Ivy (GoMoment)
listings.description: Ivy, by GoMoment, is an AI-powered guest messaging concierge used by hotels to answer common guest questions and route service requests automatically via SMS and chat. It reduces front-desk call volume by handling routine inquiries with conversational AI.

listings.name: Quicktext
listings.description: Quicktext is a Paris-based AI chatbot and messaging platform that helps hotels convert website visitors into direct bookings and manage guest communication over WhatsApp, SMS, and web chat. Its assistant, Marina, automates responses to common reservation questions.
usps: AI chatbot focused on direct booking conversion

listings.name: Asksuite
listings.description: Asksuite is a Brazilian hotel chatbot and omnichannel messaging platform that automates reservation inquiries and guest communication across a hotel's website, WhatsApp, Facebook, and Instagram. It is widely used across Latin America and expanding into other regions.

listings.name: Canary Technologies
listings.description: Canary Technologies provides a hotel guest management platform including two-way guest messaging, digital authorization, and upsell tools, replacing manual front-desk paperwork with automated digital workflows. It is used by independent hotels and major chains alike.

listings.name: Zaplox
listings.description: Zaplox is a Swedish mobile guest journey platform offering messaging alongside mobile check-in and keyless entry for hotels. Guests receive automated texts guiding them through arrival, in-stay requests, and departure without visiting the front desk.
usps: Combines messaging with mobile key journey

listings.name: Nuvola
listings.description: Nuvola is a Miami-based hotel operations platform that includes guest messaging as part of a broader suite for managing housekeeping, maintenance, and guest requests. It routes guest text messages directly to the responsible staff member or department for faster resolution.
usps: Strong Latin American & US hotel adoption

listings.name: Touch Stay
listings.description: Touch Stay is a UK-based digital guidebook platform used by hotels and vacation rental operators to share arrival instructions, local recommendations, and house rules with guests via a shareable link. It complements messaging tools by giving guests self-service access to property information.
usps: Strong vacation rental and B&B adoption

listings.name: Monscierge
listings.description: Monscierge is a US-based guest engagement platform offering messaging, digital directories, and concierge tools for hotels. Its messaging product lets guests text the front desk for requests and recommendations, which staff manage through a shared dashboard.
usps: Long-standing North American guest engagement vendor
Combines messaging with digital concierge tools
